title: rubus berolinensis
intro: Rubus berolinensis is a species of raspberry native to Europe, particularly in Germany and Poland. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubus berolinensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antimicrobial and antiviral protection. Herbal preparations of Rubus berolinensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to support digestive health and immune function.
